description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house surrounded by dense trees and enclosed by a light-colored fence. The house features a dark, steeply pitched hip roof and a light stone or concrete exterior with large, symmetrically arranged windows on all visible sides. The front entryway is marked by a double door and a paved walkway leading up to it, flanked by trees and shrubbery. There is a visible backyard area with a small pool and patio, partially enclosed by fencing and greenery. The property is well-landscaped, with mature trees providing privacy and shade around the perimeter. The overall design is stately and symmetrical, with a modern take on traditional architectural elements.
description: A stately two-story house with a dark hip roof, light stone exterior, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by dense trees and fencing.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, showing the backyard with a small pool and patio area, dense trees, and a partial view of the fence.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear facade, with symmetrical windows, dense tree coverage, and a driveway or path leading to the back.
description_view_2: The front of the house is visible, featuring a double-door entryway, paved walkway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the house is shown, with more of the fenced backyard and a clear view of the hip roof and upper windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with paved walkway, flanked by trees, no porch or columns, simple and formal
